Title: Navigate from DashboardActivity to MainActivity
Preconditions: Application is launched and DashboardActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on any navigation element in DashboardActivity.
2. Observe the transition to MainActivity.
Expected Result: MainActivity is displayed without errors.

Title: Open SignUpActivity from MainActivity
Preconditions: MainActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the sign-up button in MainActivity.
2. Observe the transition to SignUpActivity.
Expected Result: SignUpActivity is displayed without errors.

Title: Open UserListActivity from MainActivity
Preconditions: MainActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the user list button in MainActivity.
2. Observe the transition to UserListActivity.
Expected Result: UserListActivity is displayed without errors.

Title: Sign up a new user
Preconditions: SignUpActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and password in SignUpActivity.
2. Tap on the sign-up button.
3. Observe the transition back to MainActivity.
Expected Result: User is signed up successfully and redirected to MainActivity.

Title: Attempt to sign up with invalid email
Preconditions: SignUpActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email and valid password in SignUpActivity.
2. Tap on the sign-up button.
3. Observe error message indicating invalid email format.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed and user remains on SignUpActivity.

Title: Load and display user list
Preconditions: UserListActivity is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Ensure UserListActivity initializes and loads user list.
2. Verify user list is populated and displayed correctly.
Expected Result: User list is loaded and displayed without errors.

Title: Display current weather
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the "weather" button on the home page.
2. Observe the display of current weather for the user's location.
Expected Result: Current weather is displayed accurately.

Title: Zoom into current weather details
Preconditions: Current weather is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the zoom icon while viewing current weather.
2. Observe the display of more detailed weather information.
Expected Result: Detailed weather information is displayed without errors.

Title: Search for weather in other locations
Preconditions: Detailed weather information is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the search icon after viewing detailed weather information.
2. Enter a new location (e.g., New York).
3. Observe the display of weather data for the new location.
Expected Result: Weather data for the specified location is displayed accurately.

Title: Select a province and retrieve trekking routes
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Trekking' option.
2. Observe the list of provinces being displayed.
3. Select a province (e.g., Lombardy).
4. Observe the list of trekking routes in the selected province being displayed.
Expected Result: List of trekking routes in the selected province is displayed accurately.

Title: Select a specific trekking route
Preconditions: List of trekking routes is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Select a specific trekking route (e.g., Via Ferrata A).
2. Observe detailed information about the selected route being displayed.
Expected Result: Detailed information about the selected trekking route is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the list of past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: List of past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Attempt to retrieve non-existent past training data
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the response from the server indicating no past training data available.
Expected Result: Message indicating no past training data is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display recent past training data
Preconditions: User has recent past training data.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the list of recent past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: List of recent past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display older past training data
Preconditions: User has older past training data.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the list of older past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: List of older past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display mixed recent and older past training data
Preconditions: User has both recent and older past training data.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the list of both recent and older past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: List of both recent and older past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with filters applied
Preconditions: User has past training data and can apply filters.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Apply a filter (e.g., date range for last month).
3. Observe the filtered list of past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: Filtered list of past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with invalid filter applied
Preconditions: User has past training data and can apply filters.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Apply an invalid filter (e.g., future date range).
3. Observe error message indicating invalid filter.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed and user remains on the training data display screen.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with no filters applied
Preconditions: User has past training data.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the list of all past training sessions being displayed.
Expected Result: List of all past training sessions is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with empty result set
Preconditions: User has no past training data.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the 'Health' option.
2. Observe the response from the server indicating no past training data available.
Expected Result: Message indicating no past training data is displayed accurately.

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with partial result set

Title: Retrieve and display past training data with full result set
Preconditions: User has full past training data.
Test Steps:
